name: t3d
description: DDD + TDD harness for Claude Code: bounded-context layout, layer-purity hooks, red-green-refactor enforcement, project templates, a periodic drift-audit skill (t3d-sinkin) that mines past session logs (capped to 2-3 deduped pitfalls + workflows per run, with gap analysis), and a starter PITFALLS.md. 0.3.2: fixed sinkin 1b CLAUDE.md-path regex false positive.
